features: GET A WHITER SMILE: Enjoy a shiny, bright smile when you brush with Colgate Max White Sparkle Diamonds Toothpaste
SHINES ENAMEL: This whitening toothpaste recharges your the natural whiteness of your teeth by shining your enamel

SUPER COOLING SENSATION: To give you a great burst of freshness, our teeth whitening toothpaste has been designed with FreshFX technology for 10x longer lasting cooling than regular fluoride toothpaste
CAVITY FIGHTING: Our whitening toothpaste fights cavities and strengthens your enamel for great oral care and another reason to smile brightly
FRESH BREATH: Experience fresh breath with our Colgate Max White toothpaste that leaves your mouth feeling cool and clean
ENAMEL SAFE: Our Colgate whitening toothpaste is enamel safe for daily use, making it easy to maintain your oral care routine and achieve a whiter smile
TRUSTED BRAND: Colgate, a trusted name in oral care, brings you excellent teeth whitening and enamel protection
CONTAINS FLUORIDE: Contains fluoride to help reduce tartar, freshen breath and whiten for a dazzling smile
description: Product Description Reveal a bright, white smile with Colgate Max White Sparkle Diamonds Toothpaste. Our Sparkle Diamonds formula polishes the surface of your teeth, leaving them smoother and whiter. The FreshFX technology provides a cooling effect that lasts 10x longer than regular fluoride toothpaste. This teeth whitening toothpaste recharges your natural whiteness by shining your enamel for whiter teeth. Additionally, it fights cavities and strengthens your enamel for great oral care and another reason to smile brightly. Experience fresh breath with our Colgate toothpaste whitening formula that leaves your mouth feeling cool and clean. Trust Colgate, a trusted name in oral care, to bring you excellent teeth whitening and enamel protection. Ingredients Sorbitol, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Glycerin, PEG-12, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Aroma, Xanthan Gum, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Anethole, Benzyl Alcohol, Carvone, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Limonene, Mentha Viridis Leaf Oil, Menthol, CI 17200, CI 42090, CI 74160. Contains: Sodium Fluoride Total Fluoride content: 1450 ppm Directions Apply a pea-sized amount of toothpaste to a wet toothbrush. Brush in circular motions for approximately two minutes. Rinse thoroughly afterwards. Safety Warning Not for use for children under 7 years old Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
